debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
hd1 : α
tl1 : List α
HR1 :
  ∀ {n : ℕ} (sz1 : tl1.length = n) (l2 : List α) (sz2 : l2.length = n),
    (∀ (idx : Fin n), tl1[↑idx] = l2[↑idx]) → tl1 = l2
n : ℕ
sz1 : (hd1 :: tl1).length = n
hd2 : α
tl2 : List α
HR2 : ∀ (sz2 : tl2.length = n), (∀ (idx : Fin n), (hd1 :: tl1)[↑idx] = tl2[↑idx]) → hd1 :: tl1 = tl2
sz2 : (hd2 :: tl2).length = n
h : ∀ (idx : Fin n), (hd1 :: tl1)[↑idx] = (hd2 :: tl2)[↑idx]
idxv : ℕ
idxh : idxv < n - 1
⊢ idxv + 1 < n

proof:
have hn : 1 ≤ n := by
                    have : 0 < n - 1 := Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.zero_le idxv) idxh
                    exact Nat.succ_le_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.sub_pos_of_lt this) (Nat.sub_le n 1))
                  have : idxv + 1 < (n - 1) + 1 := Nat.add_lt_add_right idxh 1
                  simpa [Nat.sub_add_cancel hn, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm] using this
failed_attempts:
have hn : 0 < n := by
                    have : idxv < n := lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_trans idxh (Nat.sub_le n 1)) (Nat.le_refl _)
                    exact Nat.pos_of_lt this
                  have : n - 1 + 1 = n := Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp hn)
                  have hle : n - 1 + 1 ≤ n := by simpa [this]
                  exact lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.add_lt_add_right idxh 1) hle

have hn : 1 ≤ n := by
                    have : 0 < n - 1 := Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.zero_le _) idxh
                    exact Nat.succ_le_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le this (Nat.sub_le n 1))
                  have hle : n - 1 + 1 ≤ n := Nat.sub_add_cancel hn
                  exact Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.succ_lt_succ idxh) (by simpa [Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using hle)

have hn : 0 < n := by
                    have : 0 < n - 1 := Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.zero_lt_succ _) idxh
                    exact Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.sub_pos_of_lt this) (Nat.le_of_lt this)
                  have hle : n - 1 < n := Nat.pred_lt (Nat.ne_of_gt hn)
                  exact Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.succ_lt_succ idxh) hle

have hn : n - 1 < n := Nat.sub_lt (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by
                    intro hn0
                    have : (hd1 :: tl1).length = 0 := by simpa [hn0] using sz1
                    simpa using this
                  )) (by decide)
                  exact Nat.lt_trans (Nat.succ_lt_succ idxh) hn

have hn : n > 0 := by
                    have : (n - 1) + 1 ≤ n := Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.zero_lt_succ idxv) (Nat.succ_le_of_lt idxh)))
                    exact Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.zero_lt_succ (n - 1)) this
                  have : idxv < n - 1 := idxh
                  exact Nat.succ_lt_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le this (Nat.sub_le _ _))

have hn : 1 ≤ n := by
                    have : 0 < n - 1 := Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.zero_le idxv) idxh
                    exact Nat.succ_le_iff.1 (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.zero_lt_succ _) (Nat.le_of_lt this))
                  have hpred : n - 1 < n := Nat.pred_lt (Nat.ne_of_gt (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.zero_lt_succ _) hn))
                  exact Nat.lt_trans (Nat.succ_lt_succ idxh) hpred

have hn : 0 < n := by
                    have : idxv < n := lt_of_lt_of_le idxh (Nat.sub_le n 1)
                    exact lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.zero_le idxv) this
                  have hn1 : n - 1 + 1 = n := Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.succ_le_iff.1 hn)
                  have : idxv + 1 < n - 1 + 1 := Nat.add_lt_add_right idxh 1
                  simpa [hn1, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm] using this

have hn : 1 ≤ n := by
                    have : 0 < n - 1 := Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.zero_le _) idxh
                    exact Nat.succ_le_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.sub_pos_of_lt this) (Nat.sub_le _ _))
                  exact Nat.add_lt_of_lt_sub (by simpa [Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using idxh) hn

have hn : n - 1 < n := Nat.sub_lt (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by
                    intro hn0
                    have : (n - 1) = 0 := by simpa [hn0]
                    simpa [this] using idxh
                  )) (Nat.succ_pos 0)
                  exact Nat.lt_trans (Nat.succ_lt_succ idxh) hn

have hn : 1 ≤ n := by
                    have : 0 < n - 1 := Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.zero_le idxv) idxh
                    exact Nat.succ_le_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.sub_lt (Nat.pos_of_lt this) (by decide)) (Nat.sub_le _ _)
                  exact Nat.lt_of_lt_pred (by
                    have : idxv + 1 < n - 1 + 1 := Nat.succ_lt_succ idxh
                    simpa [Nat.sub_add_cancel hn] using this)

have hn : 1 ≤ n := by
                    have : 0 < n - 1 := Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.zero_le idxv) idxh
                    exact Nat.succ_le_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.pred_lt (Nat.ne_of_gt this)) (Nat.sub_le n 1)
                  have hle : idxv + 1 ≤ n - 1 := Nat.succ_le_of_lt idxh
                  exact Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.le_trans hle (Nat.sub_le n 1)) (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_succ_self (n - 1)) (Nat.le_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_succ_self (n - 1)) (Nat.sub_le n 1)))

have hn : 0 < n := by
                    have : 0 ≤ n - 1 := Nat.zero_le _
                    exact Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le idxh this
                  exact Nat.add_lt_of_lt_sub hn idxh

have hn : 1 ≤ n := by
                    have : 0 < n - 1 := Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt Nat.zero_le idxh
                    exact Nat.succ_le_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le this (Nat.sub_le _ _))
                  exact Nat.add_lt_of_lt_sub (n := n) (a := idxv) (b := 1) (by simpa using hn) idxh

have hn : 1 ≤ n := by
                    have : 0 < n - 1 := Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.zero_le _) idxh
                    exact Nat.succ_le_iff.mp this
                  exact Nat.add_lt_of_lt_sub (Nat.succ_lt_succ idxh) hn

have hn : 0 < n := by
                    have : 0 < n - 1 := Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.zero_le _) idxh
                    exact Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le this (Nat.sub_le _ _)
                  have hle : n - 1 + 1 ≤ n := Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.le_of_lt hn)
                  exact Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.add_lt_add_right idxh 1) hle

have hn : 1 ≤ n := by
                    have : 0 < n - 1 := Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.zero_le _) idxh
                    exact Nat.succ_le_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.sub_pos_of_lt this) (Nat.sub_le _ _))
                  exact Nat.add_lt_of_lt_sub (by simpa using idxh) hn

have hn : n - 1 < n := by
                    cases n with
                    | zero => simp at idxh
                    | succ n' => simpa [Nat.succ_sub_one] using (Nat.lt_succ_self n')
                  exact Nat.lt_trans (Nat.succ_lt_succ idxh) hn

have hn : n - 1 < n := Nat.sub_lt (Nat.pos_of_lt idxh) (by decide)
                  exact Nat.lt_trans (Nat.add_lt_add_right idxh 1) (by simpa [Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.succ_le_of_lt (Nat.pos_of_lt idxh))] using hn)

have hn : 0 < n := by
                    have : 0 < n - 1 := Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.succ_lt_succ idxh) (Nat.le_succ _)
                    exact Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le this (Nat.sub_le _ _)
                  have hle : n - 1 < n := Nat.sub_lt hn (by decide)
                  exact Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.succ_lt_succ idxh) hle

have hn : n ≠ 0 := by
                    intro hn0
                    subst hn0
                    simpa using idxh
                  have hle : n - 1 < n := Nat.sub_lt (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn) (by decide)
                  exact Nat.lt_trans (Nat.succ_lt_succ idxh) hle

have hn : n - 1 < n := Nat.sub_lt (Nat.zero_lt_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.zero_lt_succ _) (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by
                    intro hn0
                    have : n = 0 := Nat.eq_zero_of_le_zero (Nat.le_of_lt_succ (by simpa [hn0] using idxh))
                    cases idx with
                    | mk v hv =>
                      simp [this] at hv
                  )))) (Nat.succ_pos _)
                  exact Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.succ_lt_succ idxh) (Nat.succ_le_succ (Nat.le_of_lt hn))

have hn : 0 < n := by
                    have : 0 < n - 1 := Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.zero_le _) idxh
                    exact Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le this (Nat.sub_le _ _)
                  exact Nat.add_lt_of_lt_sub hn idxh

have hn : 1 ≤ n := by
                    have : 0 < n - 1 := Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.zero_le _) idxh
                    exact Nat.succ_le_iff.1 (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le this (Nat.sub_le n 1))
                  have hle : idxv + 1 ≤ n - 1 := Nat.succ_le_of_lt idxh
                  exact Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.le_trans hle (Nat.sub_le_self n 1)) (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_succ_self _) hn) (Nat.le_refl _))

have hn : 1 ≤ n := by
                    have : 0 < n - 1 := Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.zero_le _) idxh
                    exact Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.succ_le_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le this (Nat.sub_le n 1)))
                  exact Nat.add_lt_of_lt_sub (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le idxh (Nat.sub_le n 1)) hn

have hn : 1 ≤ n := by
                    have : 0 < n - 1 := Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.zero_le _) idxh
                    exact Nat.succ_le_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.pred_lt (Nat.ne_of_gt this)) (Nat.sub_le _ _))
                  exact Nat.add_lt_of_lt_sub (by simpa [Nat.sub_sub] using idxh)

have hn : 0 < n := by
                    have : 0 < n - 1 := Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.zero_le _) idxh
                    exact Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le this (Nat.sub_le _ _)
                  have hle : n - 1 + 1 ≤ n := Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp hn)
                  exact Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.add_lt_add_right idxh 1) hle

have hn : n > 0 := by
                    have : (n - 1) < n := Nat.pred_lt (Nat.ne_of_gt idxh)
                    exact Nat.pos_of_gt this
                  have hle : n - 1 ≤ n := Nat.pred_le _
                  have : idxv + 1 < (n - 1) + 1 := Nat.succ_lt_succ idxh
                  simpa [Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.succ_le_iff.2 hn)] using (lt_of_lt_of_le this (Nat.add_le_add_right hle 1))
successful_attempts:
have hn : 1 ≤ n := by
                    have : 0 < n - 1 := Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.zero_le idxv) idxh
                    exact Nat.succ_le_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.sub_pos_of_lt this) (Nat.sub_le n 1))
                  have : idxv + 1 < (n - 1) + 1 := Nat.add_lt_add_right idxh 1
                  simpa [Nat.sub_add_cancel hn, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm] using this

have hn : 1 ≤ n := by
                    have : 0 < n - 1 := Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.zero_le _) idxh
                    exact Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le this (Nat.sub_le n 1))
                  have hn' : n - 1 + 1 = n := Nat.sub_add_cancel hn
                  have : idxv + 1 < (n - 1) + 1 := Nat.succ_lt_succ idxh
                  simpa [hn'] using this

have hn : 0 < n := by
                    have : 0 < n - 1 := Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.zero_le _) idxh
                    exact Nat.lt_of_lt_pred this
                  have hn1 : n - 1 + 1 = n := Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp hn)
                  have : idxv + 1 < (n - 1) + 1 := Nat.succ_lt_succ idxh
                  simpa [hn1, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm] using this

have hn : 1 ≤ n := by
                    have : 0 < n - 1 := Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.zero_le _) idxh
                    exact Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le this (Nat.sub_le n 1))
                  have hn' : n - 1 + 1 = n := Nat.sub_add_cancel hn
                  have : idxv + 1 < (n - 1) + 1 := Nat.succ_lt_succ idxh
                  simpa [hn', Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm] using this

have hn : 1 ≤ n := by
                    have : 0 < n - 1 := Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.zero_le _) idxh
                    exact Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le this (Nat.pred_le _))
                  have : idxv + 1 < (n - 1) + 1 := Nat.succ_lt_succ idxh
                  simpa [Nat.sub_add_cancel hn] using this
